title: Judge Kitchen Granite Effect Cutting Board TC395 Dishwasher Safe Plastic Kitchen Chopping Board with Handle and Juice Groove Large 29cm x 20cm
features: HYGIENIC, LIGHTWEIGHT KITCHEN CUTTING BOARD - in light grey with natural-looking speckles made from a food-grade BPA-free plastic for hygienically preparing a wide range of foods
EASY TO STORE AND CARRY - the large handle is very handy and a deep groove round the edges ensures liquid and meat juices are collected to help avoid spills
NON-SLIP CHOPPING BOARD - silicone feet on the bottom of the board stop it from moving around while you cut, dice and chop for extra safety
KNIFE-FRIENDLY - this granite effect food grade plastic cutting surface has plenty of give, so it does not dull your knife blades

24 MONTH GUARANTEE from JUDGE HOMEWARES - Judge is a long-established brand used by thousands of families all over the world for more than a hundred years. It is known for its traditional family values and award-winning customer service
description: From the manufacturer ABOUT JUDGE HOMEWARES Judge is a long-established British brand, best known for its high-quality pans that have been a favourite in homes for more than a century. It now makes a wide range of cookware and kitchen accessories that are known all over the world for quality, reliability and performance. KEY FEATURES: BPA-free food-grade plastic Dishwasher safe Anti-slip board with silicone feet Deep all-around groove to minimise spills Large carrying handle Slimline design easy to store Knife-friendly cutting surface PEACE OF MIND Judge is a long-established British firm, based in Bristol, England, built on traditional family values. You can buy with reassurance thanks to their outstanding attention to detail.
